steps.title: Point back to Manhattan
steps.content: The first sentence locates the Inuktun speakers in Manhattan. The second sentence narrows that location to the Upper West Side, so the transition must work as a place reference.

steps.title: Reject logical misfires
steps.content: A signals similarity, but no parallel case is being compared. C signals a result, though the first sentence does not cause the Upper West Side location. D signals an example of a general claim that is not present. A location adverb fits. The answer is B.
